courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Hub and Spoke Exploration Game
genericDescription: Design navigable hubs; create landmarks and return paths; reward optional exploration.
specificDescription: Build a small hub with at least four spokes. Each spoke must contain a distinct challenge and a reward or information piece that changes how the hub is perceived or used.
gradingRubric: 30 pts hub navigation; 20 pts spoke variety; 20 pts reward design; 15 pts landmark readability; 15 pts documentation.
